source: FRED WALCL/WTREGEN/RRPONTSYD (net liquidity) + FINRA Margin Statistics (US margin debt)
note: Monthly. netliq & components in USD billions (WALCL native millions ÷1000; TGA/RRP native billions). margin debit/cash/margin in USD millions (raw FINRA). Net liquidity = Fed total assets − TGA − ON RRP.
